title: Tokenization's next use case is personalized portfolios, NYLIM executive says
summary: Thomas Sy, head of multi-asset solutions at the $800-million asset manager, says blockchain can enable complex portfolio construction that's not yet possible in traditional finance.

title: Bitcoin jumps above $63,000, reversing end-June losses
summary: The token hit its highest in over a month during thin July 4 trading, with XRP up 5% in 24 hours to lead gains among majors.

title: Bitcoin experts split over plan to freeze Satoshi's 1.1 million bitcoin as quantum threat grows
summary: Binance founder Changpeng Zhao said Satoshi Nakamoto's bitcoin should be frozen before quantum computers can steal it. Not everyone agrees.

title: How ethical hackers with just a $3,000 server found a flaw that could've put $70 billion in crypto at risk
summary: A critical flaw in the Aptos blockchain, which was patched, gave researchers a near-90% success rate at breaking a core security guarantee, with attack costs of just hundreds of dollars.

title: Why bitcoin's disconnect from record-high stocks won't last
summary: Researchers at Schwab and Hashdex said AI has diverted capital from digital assets while bitcoin continues to follow a familiar post-halving recovery pattern.
